states.name: Rolotia
states.title: Timeless Beauty
states.description:
As the avatar of Chronos, Rolotia dutifully watches over the year as it passes away. She feels the weariness of the land, strewn with bare forests and blanketed under snow. She sleeps by the side of hibernating animals, holed up in their dens. She knows, as the world does, that the end will soon arrive.

Quiet as a whisper, the world will begin anew. She will see this year from its winter birth to the heights of its summer, and though it too will die someday, she greets its first day with a smile.

states.name: Rolotia
states.title: Timeless Beauty
states.description:
Many people start the new year with self-reflection. With resolute hearts, they set out to be new people, free of the vices that have held them back. Rolotia observes these resolutions with glee, even knowing most of them will be broken. The first days of a year have a purity to them, a power that makes any dream appear within reach. If a single person sees their promises through, none of their failed resolutions were wasted.

She's no stranger to wanting a second chance.

states.name: Rolotia
states.title: Timeless Beauty
states.description:
"Sorry to keep you waiting! I made us some snacks. If it's not too cold, why don't we sit outside for a while?"

"I got everyone's new year's cards this morning. I must admit, I was a little surprised. I've welcomed in so many new years all alone. To think so many people are keeping me in their hearts today..."

"Oh, but I'm being sentimental. Here. I sent out all the others, but I wanted to give this one to you myself."

"May the year be kind to you, dear friend."
